chapter_title.en: What Allah (azwj) has Forbidden a Believer to do Against a Fellow Believer

text: 181 - وعن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام أنه قال: لا تستخف بأخيك المؤمن فيرحمه الله عز وجل عند استخفافك، ويغير ما بك.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 181. It has been narrated that Abu 'Abd Allah (a.s) said: Do not belittle your brother-in-faith lest Allah [M.G] should show mercy to him while you are belittling him and your circumstances should change for worse.
